meaning: 诺瓦腊[意大利西北部城市]
examples: This was shown by the team's attitude in the Coppa Italia against Novara.
The peloton rides during the fifth stage from Novara to Novi Ligure May 13.
They were used to seize alleged mobsters and their abettors as far north as Novara, near Turin.
Napoli moved up to fifth with a 2-0 win at home to second-bottom Novara.
The second round, in which the League lost control of the north-eastern city of Novara, will make that view more widely shared.
